classChanges.intro:
We have expanded the number of skills that grant an AP Increase buff for Hashashin Succession, allowing him to maintain this buff more consistently during skill combos.
Additionally, although Prime: Aal's Breath was designed to make up a large portion of his combo's damage, it had a long cooldown, and Hashashin could not easily make full use of the Sand Twisters' damage.
To address this, we have reworked the mechanics of Aal's Breath and shifted a portion of its damage to Hashashin's Shamshir skills, increasing their damage output.
Main Weapon, Succession
Absolute: Aal's Breath, Prime: Aal's B

When reaching level 3, it attacks nearby enemies on the spot up to the maximum number of hits then disappears.

changes.skillName: End of the Arena of Solare Regular Season
changes.description: The 8th regular season of the Arena of Solare is coming to an end. First, we would like to express our deepest gratitude to all the Adventurers who proved their valor in the Arena of Solare. Following the end of this regular season, we have prepared a special, limited-time event mode, the Solare Season Finale: Party Rumble, where you can play ranked matches as a party of 3. We hope this event mode allows you to casually enjoy the Arena of Solare with your guild members, friends, and anyone else you have been wanting to play with. More details will be provided via an event notice. We hope you look forward to the upcoming event mode as well. The Arena of Solare regular season has ended, and rewards have been distributed based on the final rank at the end of the season.

To make this achievement feel even more rewarding, we have added a special effect to Campsites equipped with Star of Nostos. Improved the visual effects for when Star of Nostos is equipped to a Campsite. Effects appear when the Campsite is summoned, dismissed, or on standby with the Star of Nostos equipped. The [Weekly] For the Throne quests in Edania have been highly popular among Adventurers, as they reward Pieces of Edana, a material used to enhance Edana Defense Gear. However, aside from Pieces of Edana, the other rewards felt somewhat lacking considering the strength of the bosses. To make taking on For the Throne feel more rewarding, we have improved the rewards. Changed the completion rewards for the [Weekly] For the Throne quests as follows:

The Edana Rising Tokens obtained from the [Weekly] For the Throne quests are used to challenge the Edana ruling each region of Edania. Since these tokens may not be useful to Adventurers who do not wish to challenge the Edana, they were made sellable. However, because the tokens expire as part of the content's progression system, some Adventurers were unable to sell them before they expired. To address this, we have improved the [Weekly] For the Throne quests so that Adventurers can now choose between an Edana Rising Token or Gold Bars as a reward. For those who receive an Edana Rising Token but later decide to sell it, its sell price will remain unchanged. Changed certain quest rewards for [Weekly] For the Throne to selectable rewards. You can now choose to receive either the corresponding Edana Rising Token or Gold Bar 100G x3.

changes.skillName: Certain Content and Monster Zone Drop Improvements
changes.before: With this update, we are improving the contents of the Yolunakea: Scalding Chest, as the rewards felt somewhat lacking compared to the time required to complete Atoraxxion: Yolunakea. Additionally, as fewer Adventurers visit the monster zones that drop Manshaum Voodoo Dolls, the trade volume of this item has decreased on the market. To address this, we have added Manshaum Voodoo Dolls as drops in higher-level monster zones in Kamasylvia and increased their drop rates in certain zones. Furthermore, the drop rate of Sturdy Forest Tread from Narc Brishka, the boss summoned with a Manshaum Voodoo Doll, has been doubled. We hope this helps alleviate the shortage. Increased the quantity of Maha's Fragments obtainable from Yolunakea: Scalding Chest. Before: x10 After: x40 ※ To ensure the same rewards are obtained regardless of the clear time, Adventurers who obtained the previous rewards during the following period have been sent Maha's Fragment x30 to their Heidel Storage. - June 25, 2026 (Thu) 00:00 - June 25, 2026 (Thu) before maintenance Added the Manshaum Voodoo Doll to the drop tables of certain monsters in the following monster zones: Ash Forest, Ash Forest [Dehkia's Lantern I & II], Gyfin Rhasia Temple (Upper), Gyfin Rhasia Temple (Upper) [Dehkia's Lantern], and Gyfin Rhasia Temple (Underground). Information about the Manshaum Voodoo Doll has been added to the Monster Zone Info UI for Gyfin Rhasia Temple and Ash Forest. "How to Obtain" information has been added to the Manshaum Voodoo Doll description. Increased the drop rate of the Manshaum Voodoo Doll by 16.5% at the Dehkia Mirumok Ruins. Doubled the drop rate of Sturdy Forest Tread from Narc Brishka summoned using 5 Manshaum Narc's Stones. The Final Gladios: Heart of Atomagia Difficulty Adjustment The Final Gladios is recommended for Adventurers with at least 330 Displayed AP. After reviewing the progress of Adventurers with 330 AP, we determined that many were having difficulty progressing through the quest and added elements to assist them. Improved the Final Gladios so that defeating Illezra's Dark Shadow applies a DP Decrease debuff to the Heart of Atomagia. The Dark Shadow is summoned when the Heart of Atomagia's HP is at 90%, 70%, 50%, and 30%. Defeating the Dark Shadow applies a DP Decrease debuff to the Heart of Atomagia for 50 sec. Applied the following changes to fix the issue where Zephyros Shadow Knights occasionally failed to appear in the Zephyros Castle Monster Zone. When Beelzebub appears, Zephyros Shadow Knights in combat are no longer killed instantly and receive a significant DP decrease instead. Zephyros Shadow Knights affected by this DP Decrease will not spawn Zephyros Shadow Priests upon death. During the mechanic that kills nearby monsters after defeating Beelzebub, the number of monsters that spawn at once has been increased by approximately 10%. Added guaranteed Essence of Dawn Box to the rewards for Calamity 9-10 Apex Changui and Bamboo Legion Lieutenant in Black Shrine - Donghae (Solo). Calamity 9: Guaranteed Essence of Dawn Box x1 Calamity 10: Guaranteed Essence of Dawn Box x2 Added the Pirate Island to the Monster Zone Info UI. Changed the Cox Female Warriors' CC to standardize CC types applied by monsters in this Monster Zone: Bound

changes.before: As part of our ongoing cleanup of pre-revamp main quests, all old Balenos main quests except [Balenos] Breaker of Chains has been removed. Please note that characters who were progressing through the old Balenos main quests will now be able to progress the [Balenos] Breaker of Chains questline. Removed all old Balenos Main Quests except the currently available "[Balenos] Breaker of Chains" main questline. Accordingly, characters currently in progress with the old Balenos main quests can now start from the first quest of [Balenos] Breaker of Chains, regardless of their previous progress. [Donkey] Krogdalo's Horse Gear Crafting Difficulty Adjustments [Donkey] Krogdalo's Horse Gear can be crafted with materials obtained through quests in Papua Crinea and Grándiha. However, compared to the difficulty of these quests, the amount of materials rewarded upon completion was relatively low, requiring a very long time to gather everything. With this update, we have lowered the difficulty of these quests or increased the rewards, allowing you to craft [Donkey] Krogdalo's Horse Gear much more easily. Changed certain objectives and rewards for quests in Papua Crinea and Grándiha. The quest titles and quest content have been changed accordingly. [Daily] I Need Mackerel Pike

The Central Market is a system that is crucial for your adventures. However, some item categories contained a mix of various items, making it difficult to find what you were looking for. With this update, we have reorganized and subdivided these categories to group items by their intended use. This should make price comparisons using filters easier and improve the overall convenience of the Central Market. Reorganized the item categories in the Central Market as follows. Subcategories under the Material category have been expanded from 8 to 11. Example of Grain category: Wheat Flour, Barley, etc.

1. Ore/Gem 2. Plants 3. Seed/Fruit 4. Leather 5. Blood 6. Meat 7. Seafood 8. Misc.\t1. Ore/Gem 2. Plants 3. Seed 4. Fruit 5. Vegetable 6. Grain 7. Seafood 8. Meat 9. Hide 10. Blood 11. Misc. Subcategories under the Consumables category have been expanded from 8 to 9. Example of Special Food category: Bountiful Feast, Assorted Kimchi, etc.

1. Offensive Elixir 2. Defensive Elixir 3. Functional Elixir 4. Food 5. Potion 6. Siege Items 7. Item Parts 8. Other Consumables\t1. Offensive Elixir 2. Defensive Elixir 3. Functional Elixir 4. Food 5. Unique Food 6. Potion 7. Siege Items 8. Item Parts 9. Other Consumables

Fixed the issue where entering the Final Gladios with an outfit that has an exclusive idle animation would play the outfit's animation before switching to combat stance. Fixed the issue where grass and trees were floating in the air in certain areas of Velandir. Fixed the issue where some of Duoksini's voice lines did not match the on-screen dialogue in Black Shrine - Donghae (Solo). Fixed the issue where Duoksini would teleport unnaturally after certain attacks in Black Shrine - Donghae (Solo). Fixed the issue where the "[Daily] Intelligent Stoneback Crab" quest could be completed without being transformed. Fixed the issue where the progress bar was visible when upgrading to an Enhanced Flame Tower or Big Hwacha during Node and Conquest Wars. Improved the Arena of Solare History UI to display active penalties when an Adventurer receives an AFK penalty in ranked matches. Improved the default sub-weapon granted upon character creation so it can be changed with a Sub-weapon Exchange Coupon. Fixed the issue where [Event] Desert Light could not be obtained from rewards for ranks below the top 20 in server contribution when defeating the World Boss Garmoth. Items that were not obtained were sent to your Mail (B) during the June 25, 2026 (Thu) maintenance. Improved the visual effects during the battle against Maleficent Centilutos in Atoraxxion: Sycrakea - Syca's Cradle to make the Power Sources that appear with Berurah more distinct. Fixed the issue where the [Dark Devotee] title, obtainable by defeating Cathawen in Atoraxxion - Orzekea, could not be acquired. Fixed the issue where the device that teleports you to Syca's Garden after defeating the boss in Atoraxxion - Sycrakea would occasionally fail to activate. Changed the "To Yolu's Cradle" button, which combines the dagger at the Sol Magia in Atoraxxion: Yolunakea, to appear at the very top of the list. Fixed the awkward placement of bushes near Oze Pass. Fixed the issue where the damage of the Vype Stoner Cannon was applied abnormally. Fixed the issue where Skill Add-ons appeared unchanged when switching Skill Presets in the Skill (K) UI. Fixed the issue where an incorrect message popup appeared when registering an item identical to a sold item without an active Value Pack. [Gamepad Mode] Fixed the issue where the Carrack-related tree was displayed when using the Ship Upgrade Tree key while viewing Guild Galley upgrade information. [Gamepad Mode] Fixed the issue where selecting a stacked item in the Sell Storage Items UI and entering the quantity would immediately open the sell window. [Gamepad Mode] Fixed the issue where items with truncated names added to the Sell Storage Items list could not be canceled. Fixed the issue where navigating to a boss from the Boss Info UI, defeating that boss, and reopening the Boss Info UI would set the navigation path to a different boss. Fixed the issue where Trace of Thunderbolt was not obtained upon opening Boss Slayer's Haul - Deposed Crown Prince (Hard). Adventurers who obtained Boss Slayer's Haul - Deposed Crown Prince (Hard) between the June 18, 2026 (Thu) maintenance and the June 25, 2026 (Thu) maintenance will receive Trace of Thunderbolt separately via the July 2 (Thu) maintenance. Fixed the issue where [Guild] Elephants and Galleys could be registered beyond the registration limit of 3. Guild mounts registered beyond the limit have been retrieved, and any equipped guild mount gear has been sent to Guild Storage. Fixed the issue where the knowledge of Slate on the Floor in Yolunakea could not be obtained properly. Fixed the issue where the Artisan Goblin Worker Contract tooltip displayed "Mountain of Eternal Winter" instead of Eilton. Fixed the issue where the quest acceptance conditions in the descriptions of Papu's Barter Supplies and Otter's Barter Supplies differed from the actual conditions. Fixed the issue where Fountain of Divine Melodies and Heaven's Tower were categorized as crafting materials, even though they are used for quest progression.

changes.skillName: Blue Battlefield - DMG Dealt to Forts Adjusted by Ship Type
changes.description: As the end time for each fort in the Blue Battlefield approaches, multiple guilds and alliances tend to focus their cannon fire on the forts. This often causes the occupying guild to change multiple times within a short period. While this can keep the excitement of victory alive until the very end, it left something to be desired in terms of the enjoyment that comes from planning and executing strategies. To address this, we have adjusted the durability of Blue Battlefield forts so they can withstand bombardment a bit longer, while also adjusting the damage ships deal to them. Increased the durability of the forts in Blue Battlefield by approx. 32%. Adjusted the damage dealt to the forts in Blue Battlefield by certain big ships as follows:

Galley\t▲ 11.90% Improved Galley\t▼ 45.14% Epheria Sailboat\t▲ 49.56% Epheria Frigate\t▲ 49.56% Epheria Caravel\t▲ 49.56% Epheria Galleass\t▲ 49.56% Improved Epheria Sailboat\t▲ 49.56% Improved Epheria Frigate\t▲ 49.56% Epheria Carrack\t▼ 21.78% Panokseon\t▼ 21.78% Epheria Galleon\t▼ 9.70%

changes.skillName: Blue Battlefield - DMG Dealt by Big Ships to Guild Galleys
changes.description: In the Blue Battlefield, Adventurers often board big ships such as Carracks and Panokseons when Guild Galleys are at full capacity or when carrying out individual objectives. However, big ships had a relatively smaller role in combat compared to Guild Galleys, which play a crucial role in destroying forts, leaving something to be desired for Adventurers who wanted to make a greater impact on the battlefield. To improve this, today's update increases the damage big ships deal to Guild Galleys. Big ships can now put more pressure on enemy Guild Galleys, increasing their ability to hinder fort destruction. As a result, it has become more important for Galleys to maneuver carefully to avoid concentrated fire. We hope these strategic elements make participating in the Blue Battlefield even more enjoyable. We understand that Adventurers in guilds that mainly relied on Guild Galleys due to having too few big ships available for the Blue Battlefield may have some concerns about today's update. However, Guild Galleys will continue to play a vital role in securing victory in the Blue Battlefield. We will continue to closely monitor the situation after the update to ensure this remains the case. Increased the damage dealt to Improved Guild Galleys and Galleys by the following big ships by approx. 24.8%:

Black Shrine - Donghae (Solo) Calamity 2-7 Reward Improvements In a previous update, Light Orbs were added to Black Shrine - Donghae, easing the difficulty of Calamity 1 to 7 Boss Blitzes. To give Adventurers taking on these difficulties a greater sense of achievement, we have improved the Boss Blitz rewards. We hope you continue to take on the challenge. Added Essence of Dawn and Gold Bars to the rewards obtainable from Calamity 2-7 in Black Shrine - Donghae (Solo).

changes.skillName: Pit of the Undying - Kharoxia Difficulty Improvements
changes.description: Kharoxia, who appears in the Pit of the Undying, had a mechanic where she could be damaged using attacks with Knockback or Floating. While some classes in Black Desert have many Knockback and Floating skills, others have more difficulty using them, causing the difficulty of fighting Kharoxia to vary by class. To address this, we have improved the mechanic so it can now also be triggered with other types of CC, allowing all classes to face Kharoxia using their own unique traits. Changed Kharoxia in PEN (V) Pit of the Undying to now be susceptible to Knockdown, Bound, Stiffness, and Stun, in addition to Knockback and Floating. ▲ Stun being applied by Ranger Awakening's Nature's Tremble

changes.skillName: Pit of the Undying - Ascendra Difficulty Improvements
changes.description: Ascendra features a mechanic where Adventurers must use her summon, Kun, against her. However, while fighting Ascendra and repeating this mechanic, Kun would sometimes be defeated, preventing Adventurers from performing the mechanic. To mitigate this issue, we have increased Kun's survivability and made additional adjustments so the mechanic can be triggered more smoothly. Increased the summon Kun's Max HP by 50%. Improved the summon Kun to perform the mechanic first when its HP falls below a certain level. Changed the activation condition for the summon Kun's HP Recovery pattern. Before: Under 50% HP After: Under 20% HP Improved the summon Kun to become Invincible while moving to perform mechanics.

Some Ocean Stalkers near Iliya Island spawned too close to the safe zone, causing Adventurers to fire at them from within the safe zone. Since cannon fire from within a safe zone does not deal damage, we have relocated these monsters to reduce this inconvenience. Changed the location of [Hungry] sea monsters and monsters around Iliya Island.

Reduced the range at which moles detect nearby Adventurers and start running by approximately 28.5%, and reduced their running distance by 30%. Reduced the time between the spawn notification message and the mole's appearance by 2 sec. Improved the pillar of light that appears when a mole spawns to appear at the mole's location. Mitigated the issue where moles could not be attacked for a certain period after spawning. Before: Moles could only be attacked after fully emerging from the ground.
